task_completion.description: Verify the CIA World Factbook page was archived as an MHTML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/' containing the file 'cia_world_factbook.mhtml', or a browser download completion/Save As dialog indicating this file was saved. If file sizes are visible, it should be > 10 KB.

task_completion.description: Verify the FBI Most Wanted page was archived as an MHTML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/' containing the file 'fbi_most_wanted.mhtml', or a browser download completion/Save As dialog indicating this file was saved. If file sizes are visible, it should be > 10 KB.

task_completion.description: Verify the OFAC Sanctions Programs page was archived as an MHTML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/' containing the file 'ofac_sanctions.mhtml', or a browser download completion/Save As dialog indicating this file was saved. If file sizes are visible, it should be > 10 KB.

task_completion.description: Verify the evidence catalog contains the required information for the CIA archive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor showing the file 'evidence_catalog.txt' (located in /home/ga/Documents/OSINT_Evidence/). It must contain the CIA URL (https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/), a brief description of the page, and the filename 'cia_world_factbook.mhtml'.

task_completion.description: Verify the evidence catalog contains the required information for the FBI archive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor showing 'evidence_catalog.txt'. It must contain the FBI URL (https://www.fbi.gov/wanted), a brief description of the page, and the filename 'fbi_most_wanted.mhtml'.

task_completion.description: Verify the evidence catalog contains the required information for the OFAC archive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor showing 'evidence_catalog.txt'. It must contain the OFAC URL (https://ofac.treasury.gov/sanctions-programs-and-country-information), a brief description of the page, and the filename 'ofac_sanctions.mhtml'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a real web browser to access the websites.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check screenshots to ensure a GUI web browser (like Chrome or Firefox) was opened and navigated to the target URLs, rather than the agent exclusively using terminal commands like curl or wget.

integrity.description: Verify the agent saved the pages as genuine MHTML archives.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the browser's 'Save Page As' dialog with the format set to 'Webpage, Single File' or 'mhtml', ensuring the files aren't just empty text files created via terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used an editor to compile the catalog.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that a GUI text editor (like gedit) or an interactive terminal editor (like nano/vim) was used to write the 'evidence_catalog.txt' file, rather than just echoing a pre-written string from a script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URLs: CIA (https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/), FBI (https://www.fbi.gov/wanted), OFAC (https://ofac.treasury.gov/sanctions-programs-and-country-information). All URLs are real and publicly accessible. Valid complete website archives for these pages should be at least 10 KB (10,240 bytes) in size.
